title: [TaCZ] IronsArms - Iron's Spells & Timeless and Classics Zero
description: Add functionality to trigger Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks magic using TaCZ guns.
body:
![IronsArms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8712fc0c6656a8b854eb42cf4183e918c53ead7.png)

## **IronsArms is an integration addon for TaCZ and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks.**

**This mod requires** **[CastLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/castlib), [ArmsLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/armslib)**

 

### **Highlights**

*   You can now fire spells using TaCZ guns. Since the spells are launched from firearms, they shoot faster!
*   To continuously cast spells beyond your current mana level, you can store mana in an ammo box in advance!
*   Using the Arcane Anvil, you can imbue an ammo box with a spell and fire it through the TaCZ Gun. You don’t need a separate gun for each spell.

### **How to Use**

1.  Use the Arcane Anvil to imbue an ammo box with a spell from Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks.
2.  Insert ammunition into the ammo box.
3.  Placing the ammo box in a Curios slot charges mana.
4.  Enable IronsMode by assigning a key in the settings.
5.  Select a spell from the Spell Selector in the bottom-left corner, then reload your weapon and fire.

 

### **Notes**

*   Make sure to enable IronsMode in the key configuration settings.
